description: SSO JWT CLI with hardware-backed secure caching (Secure Enclave / TPM)
post_install: Write-Host 'Run "sso-jwt install" to configure WSL distributions.'
notes: Run 'sso-jwt add-server default --from-github gdcorp-im/sso-jwt-config/godaddy.toml --default' to configure.
Run 'sso-jwt install' to set up WSL distributions.
